=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
November 16 1993
The Supper Club New York, NY  (Early Show+Late Show)

lineage unknown received in trade 

cd-r>EAC (secure mode)>TLH> flac (Level-8)>md-5>torrent


Early show
Absolutely Sweet Marie 
Lay Lady Lay 
Blood In My Eyes 
Queen Jane Approximately 
Tight Connection To My Heart 
Disease Of Conceit 
I Want You 
Ring Them Bells 
My Back Pages 
Forever Young 

Late show
Ragged And Dirty  
Lay Lady Lay  
I'll Be Your Baby Tonight  
Queen Jane Approximately  
Jack-A-Roe  
One Too Many Mornings  
I Want You  
Ring Them Bells  
My Back Pages  
Forever Young
